bsu.by robots.txt exposed a sitemap and did not disallow the official news URL fetched in this crawl.
elib.bsu.by robots.txt disallows discovery search paths but not handle or bitstream URLs used here.
library.bsu.by robots.txt disallows Joomla system paths but not the public PDF path fetched here.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for Belarusian State University found BSU official news, repository, and library-hosted materials discussing AI and ChatGPT. It did not verify a central binding BSU AI policy or student/faculty AI-use rule page; research and seminar materials are therefore treated as limited sources rather than university-wide policy.

artifacts.claimText: This crawl did not verify a central Belarusian State University binding policy or rule page for generative AI use; official-domain results instead showed BSU news, repository, and library materials that are limited to research, comparison, or training context.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Политики в области регулирования использования искусственного интеллекта в высшем образовании белорусских и российских университетов
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Белорусские университеты. После публикации в июне 2025 г. Министерством образования Республики Беларусь «Методических рекомендаций по внедрению технологий искусственного интеллекта... белорусские университеты приступили к написанию внутренних политик. На момент написания публикации в открытых источниках доступна информация о следующих университетах (таблица).
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The paper says Belarusian universities began writing internal AI policies after June 2025 national recommendations, and its open-source table lists specific universities; BSU was not among the listed policy examples.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF text pages 36-37 and repository handle metadata
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: «Искусственный интеллект никогда не заменит преподавателя, но может ему помочь»: НИКИТА АЗАРОВ
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Для внедрения нейросетей в систему образования мы анализируем алгоритмы работы наиболее популярных и глобальных чат-ботов. Это ChatGPT и Deepseek... Студентам советую пользоваться нейросетью с осторожностью и всегда перепроверять информацию, если решили воспользоваться помощью программы.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The BSU article says ChatGPT and Deepseek are being analyzed for education-system use and advises students to use neural networks cautiously and verify information.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Article section «Искусственный интеллект для БГУ» and later student advice paragraph
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-status claim only. The crawl did not find verified central BSU AI policy evidence, and limited official-domain sources should not be promoted as binding policy.
Approved as a narrow official-news claim; it does not assert a rule, permission, or mandatory policy.
Approved as a limited training-material claim; the wording explicitly avoids treating the seminar PDF as binding university policy.

artifacts.title: Belarusian State University AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official-source crawl for Belarusian State University did not verify a central binding AI-use policy. The strongest official-domain sources located were a BSU news article on AI in education, a BSU repository record comparing AI policies across Belarusian and Russian universities, and a BSU library-hosted seminar PDF on AI in academic work.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central BSU AI policy page was verified in this crawl; research, news, and seminar sources were not treated as binding policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
